name: HiberG8 - Browser Traffic Safe-Hold
description: Hold all browser traffic on untrusted networks until you review your connection and Green Light it. VPN-confirmation gate. Does not hibernate tabs.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
